testcase.name: tc01_initiatePayinTransaction
testcase.system-out:
20:10:37.063 INFO [c.p.payin.utils.ConfigReader] Loaded config: config/config.properties (env=dev) 20:10:37.065 INFO [c.p.p.tests.PayinEndToEndTest] --- Starting: PayinEndToEndTest --- 20:10:37.139 INFO [c.p.payin.api.PayinApiService] POST /payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent | orderId=TL5TTET86GE4Y66E9PR7 Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "checksum": "a5bc309f0f3bbfc655fa2c75cc7c8c301e4b87a0979bf0879f04d348d6c5eb0e", "encryptedBody": "l4FXA8TecNLuqzLab96nB+U4N9A7sQPxjZQCIKC34j3SgZJQbUKYIadeuUF2XoOVCbI2rQKkBSkcjG7vxIM8MoSwDKcbsCoNRylfEXWiDKMhBH5jARk3bWl063Z3J7Ec4RPwU+17WMbaTF67ONiW4dbw6o/wtiC3onxajU6LRoLk8+4jKQ65grEd6YpuPRzWWFNUo4OOpcjECmExkD2HgvTI0nqrAkJBYIK4Gc8Wu6u22VWRfxvRkb7E0QeBI1pL" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 463 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 14:40:39 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1
{ "timestamp": "2026-06-17T14:40:39.350Z", "statusCode": 200, "status": "OK", "message": "Transaction Initiated Successfully", "success": true, "data": "" } 20:10:39.836 DEBUG [c.p.payin.api.PayinApiService] Decrypted response: {"orderId":"TL5TTET86GE4Y66E9PR7","txnRefId":"TRAOCB202661781038","paymentUrl":"upi://pay?pa=DisanEssenti351468.airpay@rbl&pn=Disan+Essentials+4&cu=INR&tn=Pay+to+Disan+Essentials+4&am=100.00&mc=5311&mode=04&tr=AIRPAY1958849159"} 20:10:39.846 INFO [c.p.p.tests.PayinEndToEndTest] Initiated | orderId=TL5TTET86GE4Y66E9PR7 | txnRefId=TRAOCB202661781038 20:10:39.846 INFO [c.p.p.tests.PayinEndToEndTest] --- Finished: PayinEndToEndTest ---

testcase.name: tc02_verifyPayinStatus

failure.message: tc01 must run first to set orderId

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: tc01 must run first to set orderId at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at
